challenge.explanation:
Da biste pronašli tačan odgovor, pogledajte deo u kojem članak diskutuje potencijalno rešenje.

Makini na The best solution might be... Ovo pokazuje da kompanije bi trebalo dozvoliti zaposlenima da biraju između nameštaja i tehnologije u skladu sa njihovim potrebama.

Obratite pažnju kako članak balansira različite perspektive i nudi fleksibilno rešenje.
challenge.instructions: Pročitajte tekst i odgovorite na pitanje koje je navedeno/nalazi se ispod.

questions.text:
Nakon pregleda rezultata studije o subvencijama za rad na daljinu, Bob je odlučio da napiše članak:

The Remote Work Stipend Debate: Comfort or Productivity?

A recent survey showed that remote workers have different opinions on how to use their work stipend. Most people want to spend it on office furniture, like a good chair and desk, to improve comfort and prevent back pain. Others believe that upgrading old computers is more important because slow devices can make work harder and less efficient.

So, what is more important — a better workspace or better technology?

A bad chair and desk can cause health problems and make it difficult to focus. But an outdated computer can be just as frustrating, slowing down work and reducing productivity.

The best solution might be to allow the stipend to cover both. This way, employees can choose what they need most to stay comfortable and work efficiently.

As remote work grows, companies need to support their workers in the best way possible. A well-equipped home office isn't just a nice extra — it's key to doing great work.

Je, makala inaonyesha kampuni zinapaswa kuwasaidia vipi wafanyakazi wa mbali?

answers.answer: Kwa kuwataka wafanyakazi wote kuboresha kompyuta zao.
answers.feedback: Makala inaonyesha kuwapa wafanyakazi chaguo, si kuwalazimisha kuboresha.
Tekst je usmeren na unapređenje kućne kancelarije, a ne na povećanje radnog vremena.

answers.answer: Kwa kuruhusu ruzuku ifadhili samani na teknolojia.

answers.feedback: Makala inajadili jinsi ruzuku zinavyoweza kutumika kwa ufanisi, si kuzibadilisha na bonasi.

challenge.title: Vežba 48
